home.heroSubtitle: Providing high-quality industrial machinery solutions for global customers

cnc-machine.name: CNC Machining Center
cnc-machine.shortDesc: High-precision CNC machining center for complex parts processing
cnc-machine.description: Our CNC Machining Center delivers exceptional precision and efficiency for complex machining operations. Designed for high-volume production environments, it features advanced control systems and robust construction.

laser-cutter.name: Laser Cutting Machine
laser-cutter.shortDesc: High-speed laser cutting system for metal sheets
laser-cutter.description: Our Laser Cutting Machine offers fast, precise cutting of metal sheets with minimal waste. The advanced laser technology ensures clean cuts and high productivity for industrial manufacturing.

press-machine.name: Hydraulic Press Machine
press-machine.shortDesc: Heavy-duty hydraulic press for metal forming
press-machine.description: Our Hydraulic Press Machine provides powerful and precise metal forming capabilities. Built with heavy-duty construction, it handles demanding forming operations with consistent quality.

welding-robot.name: Industrial Welding Robot
welding-robot.shortDesc: Automated welding system for precision joining
welding-robot.description: Our Industrial Welding Robot delivers consistent, high-quality welds in automated production environments. The multi-axis robot arm provides precise positioning for complex welding tasks.

injection-molding.name: Injection Molding Machine
injection-molding.description: Our Injection Molding Machine delivers high-efficiency production of plastic components with consistent quality. Features advanced temperature control and energy-saving technology for optimal performance.

lathe.name: CNC Lathe
lathe.shortDesc: Precision turning machine for cylindrical parts
lathe.description: Our CNC Lathe provides high-precision turning operations for cylindrical and complex-shaped parts. Ideal for small to medium batch production with excellent repeatability.

grinding.name: Surface Grinding Machine
grinding.description: Our Surface Grinding Machine delivers exceptional surface finish quality for precision parts. Features advanced vibration damping and thermal compensation for stable precision.

edm.name: EDM Wire Cutting Machine
edm.shortDesc: Electrical discharge machining for complex shapes
edm.description: Our EDM Wire Cutting Machine enables precise cutting of complex shapes in hard materials. Ideal for tool manufacturing and precision component production.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Professional Machinery Manufacturing Expert
about.introduction: Precision Machinery is a leading manufacturer of industrial machinery with over 20 years of experience. We specialize in CNC machining centers, laser cutting machines, hydraulic presses, welding robots, and other precision equipment.
about.missionText: To provide high-quality, reliable machinery solutions that empower our customers to achieve greater productivity and success.
about.visionText: To become the global leader in precision machinery manufacturing through innovation and excellence.
about.value1: Quality - We deliver products that meet the highest standards
about.value2: Innovation - We continuously improve through technology
about.value3: Customer Focus - We prioritize customer satisfaction
about.value4: Integrity - We conduct business with honesty and transparency
about.teamText: Our team consists of experienced engineers, technicians, and industry experts dedicated to delivering exceptional products and services.
about.facilityText: With state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities spanning over 50,000 square meters, we have the capacity to meet large-scale production demands while maintaining strict quality control.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Get in touch with our team
